---
title: "The Unpublished Series"
page-layout: full
---

## Science, expressed your way.

You have something real to say. A discovery, a question, a theory that won't leave you alone. But the only system available asks you to strip out your voice, your instinct, your way of thinking and replace it with a format that was never built for you.

The Unpublished Series exists because science belongs to everyone who thinks rigorously and honestly, regardless of how they express it.

Share your work here. In your voice. In your form. With a community that verifies through openness rather than gatekeeping.

Your science. Finally, the way you think it.

---

## How we share here

**Express it as you feel it.**  
Don't translate your thinking into someone else's format. 
Share it the way it lives in your mind.

**Show where you're uncertain.**  
Your uncertainties aren't weaknesses. They're invitations. 
Share them openly.

**Let the community help you build it.**  
Bring what you have. Ask what you need. This is a place 
where incomplete thinking becomes collaborative discovery.

---

## What lives here

- Interactive research notebooks
- Visual essays & infographics  
- Audio & podcast episodes
- Video

No required format. No gatekeeping. Just rigorous, 
open, expressive science.

---

## First research

::: {.callout-note}
## Biosignature Detection via IR Spectroscopy
Detecting molecular biosignatures on 2MASS J12073346-3932539 b 
using JWST data. Interactive notebook coming soon.
:::
